basic_details.job_title: APSC Drilling Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Assam Public Service Commission (APSC) Drilling Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website of APSC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the APSC Drilling Engineer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST (upto 43 years), 3 years for OBC/MOBC (upto 41 years), 10 years for PwBD irrespective of category.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in Mechanical Engineering, AMIE (Part A & B) in Mechanical Engineering (enrolled on or before 31.05.2013)
qualification.details: Graduation in Mechanical Engineering from any University or Institution recognized by the Government. OR Candidate must have passed (Part A & B) of AMIE (India) in Mechanical Engineering if enrolled on or before 31.05.2013.

salary_details.details: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 1,10,000/- + Rs. 12,700/- Grade Pay Per Month

selection_process: Direct Recruitment - details to be notified later
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the APSC Drilling Engineer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of APSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download APSC Drilling Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.assam_public_service_commission_apsc: Graduation in Mechanical Engineering, AMIE (Part A & B) in Mechanical Engineering (enrolled on or before 31.05.2013)

content_sections.heading: APSC Drilling Engineer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the APSC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download APSC Drilling Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

APSC Drilling Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graduation in Mechanical Engineering from any University or Institution recognized by the Government. OR Candidate must have passed (Part A & B) of AMIE (India) in Mechanical Engineering if enrolled on or before 31.05.2013.

content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST (upto 43 years), 3 years for OBC/MOBC (upto 41 years), 10 years for PwBD irrespective of category.

content_sections.heading: APSC Drilling Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Direct Recruitment - details to be notified later

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the APSC Drilling Engineer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of APSC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: APSC Drilling Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the APSC Drilling Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the APSC Drilling Engineer recruitment is 23rd July 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Drilling Engineer post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Drilling Engineer post is 21 years. Candidates must meet this age criterion to be eligible for the application.

faq.question: Q3. What educational qualification is required for the Drilling Engineer position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduation in Mechanical Engineering or AMIE (Part A & B) in Mechanical Engineering (enrolled on or before 31.05.2013) to apply for the Drilling Engineer post.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Drilling Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is only 1 vacancy available for the Drilling Engineer post in this recruitment drive by APSC.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC category candidates is 297.20. This fee needs to be paid during the online application process.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is age relaxation. SC/ST candidates get 5 years relaxation, OBC/MOBC get 3 years, and PwBD candidates get 10 years relaxation.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Drilling Engineer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Drilling Engineer post will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 110,000 per month, plus a Grade Pay of Rs. 12,700.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment is Direct Recruitment. However, further details regarding the selection process will be notified later by APSC.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the APSC Drilling Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official APSC recruitment website. The application process starts on 24th June 2026 and ends on 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the APSC's official website or through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article once available.
